channel.title: GitHub Svelte Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Svelte in GitHub

item.title: taikoxyz/taiko-mono
item.description: Taiko Alethia based rollup protocol 🥁

item.title: RockinChaos/Shiru
item.description: BitTorrent streaming software with no paws in the way—watch anime in real-time, no waiting for downloads!

item.title: vkurko/calendar
item.description: Full-sized drag & drop JavaScript event calendar with resource & timeline views

item.title: seanmorley15/AdventureLog
item.description: Self-hostable travel tracker and trip planner.

item.title: dbgate/dbgate
item.description: Database manager for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MongoDB, SQLite and others. Runs under Windows, Linux, Mac or as web application

item.title: skyline69/balatro-mod-manager
item.description: Balatro Mod Manager by Skyline

item.title: saadeghi/daisyui
item.description: 🌼 🌼 🌼 🌼 🌼  The most popular, free and open-source Tailwind CSS component library

item.title: ChurchApps/FreeShow
item.description: FreeShow is a free and open-source, user-friendly presenter software.

item.title: threlte/threlte
item.description: 3D framework for Svelte

item.title: zerebos/ghostty-config
item.description: A beautiful config generator for Ghostty terminal.

item.title: rajnandan1/kener
item.description: Stunning status pages, batteries included!

item.title: pluja/whishper
item.description: Transcribe any audio to text, translate and edit subtitles 100% locally with a web UI. Powered by whisper models!

item.title: imputnet/cobalt
item.description: best way to save what you love

item.title: mathesar-foundation/mathesar
item.description: An intuitive spreadsheet-like interface that lets users of all technical skill levels view, edit, query, and collaborate on Postgres data directly—100% open source and self hosted, with native Postgres access control.

item.title: Materialious/Materialious
item.description: Materialious is a modern material design frontend for Invidious, focused on a clean, privacy-friendly YouTube experience. It supports local video fallback when Invidious fails and is available on Web, Desktop, Android, and Android TV.

item.title: dora-team/dora.dev
item.description: Public-facing knowledge site: https://dora.dev

item.title: CriticalMoments/CMSaasStarter
item.description: A modern SaaS template/boilerplate built with SvelteKit, Tailwind, and Supabase. Includes marketing page, blog, subscriptions, auth, user dashboard, user settings, pricing page, and more.

item.title: matt8707/ha-fusion
item.description: A modern, easy-to-use and performant custom Home Assistant dashboard

item.title: satisfactorymodding/SatisfactoryModManager
item.description: A mod manager for easy installation of mods and modloader for Satisfactory

item.title: nmelhado/league-page
item.description: Create a custom league page for your Sleeper fantasy football league!
